title_en: Importance for Students and Available Editions
content_en:
Al-Isabah fi Tamyiz as-Sahabah is an essential reference for any student of the Islamic sciences. Its importance is not as a sequential reading text but as a reference to be consulted whenever information is needed about a specific Companion of the Prophet. Students who encounter names in hadith chains, in historical accounts of early Islam, or in fiqh works citing opinions of specific Companions can turn to Al-Isabah for the most comprehensive and reliable account of who that person was.

For students of hadith specifically, Al-Isabah is indispensable. The Companions occupy the first link in every hadith chain, and understanding who they were — their relationship to the Prophet, their character, their status as reliable transmitters — is foundational for hadith study. Ibn Hajar's critical assessments of the evidence relating to each Companion, based on his unparalleled mastery of the hadith literature, are the standard reference for these determinations.

For students of early Islamic history, Al-Isabah documents the composition of the early Muslim community with a comprehensiveness not available elsewhere. The biographical information about hundreds of Companions — their tribal affiliations, their participation in specific events, their later activities — provides raw material for understanding the social history of the early community.

For students of Islamic law, Al-Isabah is relevant because many legal rulings depend on the opinions of specific Companions as transmitted through their students. Understanding the background of these transmitters helps contextualize their legal opinions.

The standard modern edition is the eight-volume set edited by Ali Muhammad al-Bajawi and published by Dar al-Jil in Beirut, as well as the edition published by Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah in Beirut (also eight volumes). A highly regarded critical edition in twelve volumes was prepared by Adil Ahmad Abd al-Mawjud and Ali Muhammad Mu'awwad (Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah). No complete English translation exists, though Syed Moinul Haq produced an Urdu translation in the subcontinent. The work is available on major Islamic digital platforms, and the ability to search it digitally for specific names makes it far more practically useful than consulting the printed indexes alone.
content_id:
Al-Isabah fi Tamyiz as-Sahabah adalah referensi penting bagi setiap penuntut ilmu Islam. Nilai utamanya bukan sebagai teks bacaan berurutan, melainkan sebagai rujukan yang dapat dikonsultasikan setiap kali diperlukan informasi tentang seorang Sahabat Nabi tertentu. Para penuntut ilmu yang menemukan nama-nama dalam sanad hadits, dalam catatan sejarah Islam awal, atau dalam karya-karya fikih yang mengutip pendapat Sahabat tertentu dapat merujuk kepada Al-Isabah untuk mendapatkan keterangan yang paling komprehensif dan terpercaya tentang siapa orang tersebut.

Bagi penuntut ilmu hadits khususnya, Al-Isabah adalah rujukan yang tidak dapat ditinggalkan. Para Sahabat menempati mata rantai pertama dalam setiap sanad hadits, dan memahami siapa mereka — hubungan mereka dengan Nabi, karakter mereka, status mereka sebagai perawi yang terpercaya — merupakan fondasi dalam studi hadits. Penilaian kritis Ibn Hajar terhadap bukti-bukti yang berkaitan dengan setiap Sahabat, berdasarkan penguasaannya yang tak tertandingi atas literatur hadits, menjadi rujukan standar untuk penentuan tersebut.

Bagi penuntut ilmu sejarah Islam awal, Al-Isabah mendokumentasikan komposisi komunitas Muslim perdana dengan tingkat kelengkapan yang tidak tersedia di tempat lain. Informasi biografis tentang ratusan Sahabat — afiliasi kesukuan mereka, keikutsertaan mereka dalam peristiwa-peristiwa tertentu, serta aktivitas mereka di kemudian hari — menyediakan bahan mentah untuk memahami sejarah sosial komunitas awal tersebut.

Bagi penuntut ilmu hukum Islam, Al-Isabah relevan karena banyak hukum fikih bergantung pada pendapat Sahabat tertentu sebagaimana diriwayatkan melalui murid-murid mereka. Memahami latar belakang para perawi ini membantu dalam mengontekstualisasikan pendapat-pendapat hukum mereka.

Edisi modern standar adalah set delapan jilid yang disunting oleh Ali Muhammad al-Bajawi dan diterbitkan oleh Dar al-Jil di Beirut, serta edisi yang diterbitkan oleh Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah di Beirut (juga delapan jilid). Sebuah edisi kritis yang sangat dihargai dalam dua belas jilid telah disiapkan oleh Adil Ahmad Abd al-Mawjud dan Ali Muhammad Mu'awwad (Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah). Tidak ada terjemahan bahasa Inggris yang lengkap, meskipun Syed Moinul Haq pernah menghasilkan terjemahan dalam bahasa Urdu di anak benua India. Karya ini tersedia di platform digital Islam terkemuka, dan kemampuan untuk mencari nama-nama tertentu secara digital menjadikannya jauh lebih praktis dibandingkan hanya mengandalkan indeks versi cetak.
title_id: Pentingnya bagi Para Pelajar dan Edisi yang Tersedia
content_ar: Al-Isabah fi Tamyiz as-الصحابة is an الجوهري reference for any student of the Islamic sciences. Its importance is not as a sequential reading text but as a reference to be consulted كلما information is needed about a specific Companion of النبي ﷺ. Students who encounter names in الحديث chains, in historical accounts of early الإسلام, or in الفقه works citing opinions of specific الصحابة can turn to Al-Isabah for the most comprehensive and reliable account of who that person was. For students of الحديث specifically, Al-Isabah is indispensable. The الصحابة occupy the أولاً link in every الحديث chain, and الفهم who they were — their relationship to النبي ﷺ, their الأخلاق, their status as reliable transmitters — is foundational for الحديث study. Ibn Hajar's البالغ الأهمية assessments of the evidence relating to each Companion, based on his unparalleled mastery of the الحديث literature, are the standard reference for these determinations. For students of early Islamic history, Al-Isabah documents the composition of the early مسلم الجماعة with a comprehensiveness not available elsewhere. The biographical information about hundreds of الصحابة — their tribal affiliations, their participation in specific events, their later activities — provides raw material for الفهم the social history of the early الجماعة. For students of Islamic law, Al-Isabah is relevant لأن many legal rulings depend on the opinions of specific الصحابة as transmitted through their students. الفهم the background of these transmitters helps contextualize their legal opinions. The standard modern edition is the eight-volume set edited by علي محمد ﷺ al-Bajawi and published by Dar al-Jil in Beirut, as well as the edition published by Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah in Beirut (أيضاً eight volumes). A highly regarded البالغ الأهمية edition in twelve volumes was prepared by Adil أحمد Abd al-Mawjud and علي محمد ﷺ Mu'awwad (Dar al-Kutub al-Ilmiyyah). No complete English translation exists, though Syed Moinul Haq produced an Urdu translation in the subcontinent. The work is available on major Islamic digital platforms, and the ability to search it digitally for specific names makes it far more practically useful than consulting the printed indexes alone.
